title: Mechanical Engineer (Building Services)
description:
Responsibilities :

  • Provide Mechanical engineering services design and project administration for building projects in Singapore & Overseas.
  • Commissioning of design with close collaboration with other building service discipline design team within office, project Owners and other Consultants.
  • Preparation of tender enquiry documents & specification drawings.
  • Assisting Owner to call tender, conduct site show around, arranging and conducting of tender interviews, carry out tender evaluation & reports and recommendation of contract award.
  • Full project administration including project control, planning, project progress monitoring, costing, attending Owner/Consultant and site meetings (local and overseas), reviewing and approval of shop drawings and materials, progress payment evaluation, attending T&C, etc till full project completion.
  • Liaising with authorities for compliances, plan submissions and approval.
  • Arranging and attending site inspections by independent inspectors and authorities for clearances.

Requirements :

  • Recognised Degree in Mechanical Engineering or Building Services from reputable University.
  • Minimum 2 years working experience in Building services design and contract administration.
  • Conversant with Singapore building services Codes, Regulations and requirements is compulsory.
  • Conversant with international codes would be an advantage.
  • Conversant with Microsoft Office Suite and Autocad softwares.
  • Conversant with Revit software would be an advantage.
  • Able to travel.

postedCompany.description:
Ace-Tech Design Private Limited is established in July 2000 to provide a wide range of consultancy and engineering services to the building construction industry in Singapore and the South East Asia region. The firm is also geared to take up design and build projects in tandem with the current industry sentiment.


Dedication and good working attitude are the main attribute and culture of the Organisation. Together with the experience and expertise in planning, design, implementation and project management skills, the  firm is involved in numerous prestigious projects in Singapore and the region. Among the projects completed by the the firm are hotels (the Four Seasons Hotel-Singapore, Hard Rock Hotel-Bali, Four Seasons Resort Extension-Bali at Jimbaran, Four Seasons Resort-Seychelles, Four Seasons Resort-Maldives, Hard Rock Hotel- Pattaya), commercial buildings ( Tiong Bahru Plaza, West Mall, Hanoi Tower Centre-Hanoi ), residential ( The Makena, Regent Height ), schools/military camps ( Singapore Polytechnic 3rd and 5th Phase , Safti Military Institute ), hospitals ( Brain Centre-SGH, Radiotheraphy Centre-NUH ) and embassies ( Singapore Embassies in Bangkok & Phnom Penh).


The company also handled tenancy, minor alterations and additions works. The company’s list of Clients includes Owner of Burger King Restaurants, Starbucks Cafes, Hard Rock Cafes, Polo Ralph Lauren Retail Shops and Edo Sushi Restaurants, Gengki Sushi Restaurants, Fuji Xerox, Kuo International, Sheraton Towers Singapore, KPMG, Gemplus, DBS, Deutsche Bank & Maybank. The administration of such fast track projects required high level of technical skills, prompt and accurate decision-makings capability. Our experienced staffs have the proven track record and the required expertise to work in such environment.


Ace-Tech is also committed to provide high quality services to their Clients. It is the company motto to provide Clients with economical, practical and no frills engineering design and works to meet the Client requirements and budget.
postedCompany.name: ACE-TECH DESIGN PTE LTD
